AI.method: 使用周期性密度泛函理论（DFT）分析一系列已知的有机电子材料晶体结构，计算其光吸收、还原和氧化电位等电子性质，并与文献实验数据比较。同时进行气相分子计算，验证其与周期性DFT和实验数据的一致性。
AI.result: 计算结果显示，气相分子计算与文献数据和周期性DFT在有机分子晶体的光电性质方面具有良好的一致性。这表明气相分子计算可以用于以较低计算成本筛选适用于全水分解的有机晶体材料。
AI.conclusion: 气相分子计算可作为有效的筛选工具，用于识别具有光催化全水分解潜力的有机晶体材料，显著降低计算成本，为有机光催化材料的设计和开发提供新途径。

title: Physical Pictures for Quasisymmetry in Crystals
summary: Quasisymmetry (QS) provides a novel route to understand and control near-degeneracies, Berry curvature, optical selection rules, and symmetry-protected phenomena in quantum materials. Here we give physical interpretations of the emergence of QS operators across multiple material families. Using density functional theory and the $\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{p}$ formalism, we identify QS subspaces and calculate their representation matrices, quantifying the quasisymmetry via a metric $ε$ that measures subspace invariance. For Sn/SiC and transition-metal dichalcogenide monolayers, QS corresponds to an emergent mirror symmetry, whereas in wurtzite crystals it manifests as an emergent spatial inversion. By contrast, for AgLa the QS appearing in avoided crossings is inherited from a nearby high-symmetry point rather than being an emergent lattice symmetry. Combining group-theoretical analysis and $\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{p}$ modeling, our results establish concrete physical pictures for QS and provide practical criteria to diagnose it in first-principles calculations.

AI.tldr: 论文提出准对称性(QS)作为理解量子材料中近简并、贝里曲率、光学选择规则和对称性保护现象的新框架，通过DFT和k·p方法识别QS子空间并用量化指标ε度量，在不同材料体系中展示了QS的不同物理起源。
AI.motivation: 准对称性为理解量子材料中的近简并、贝里曲率、光学选择规则和对称性保护现象提供了新途径，但缺乏具体的物理解释和诊断方法。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论(DFT)和k·p形式，识别准对称性子空间并计算其表示矩阵，通过度量ε量化子空间不变性，结合群论分析和k·p建模。
AI.result: 在Sn/SiC和过渡金属硫族化合物单层中，QS表现为涌现的镜像对称性；在纤锌矿晶体中表现为涌现的空间反演对称性；在AgLa中，出现在避免交叉点的QS继承自附近的高对称点而非涌现的晶格对称性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为准对称性建立了具体的物理图像，并为第一性原理计算中诊断QS提供了实用标准，有助于理解和控制量子材料中的对称性相关现象。

title: Second-Coordination-Sphere Cation Substitution as a Tool for Controlling Phase Transitions and Performance of the Luminescence Thermometry
summary: Despite the exceptionally high relative sensitivities achieved by luminescent thermometers based on first-order structural phase transitions, their principal limitation lies in the inherently narrow thermal operating range associated with the transition temperature. In this work, we demonstrate that partial substitution of Li+ by Na+ ions in the second coordination sphere of Eu3+ ions in LiYO2 enables a substantial shift of the phase transition temperature, thereby allowing controlled optimization of the thermometric performance. This approach represents a significantly more cost-effective and efficient strategy for tuning the phase transition temperature compared with the previously proposed substitution of Y3+ by other lanthanide ions. Importantly, we show that lowering the transition temperature through Na+ incorporation simultaneously introduces static compositional disorder and local lattice strain. As a consequence, the enthalpy difference between the competing structural phases decreases, and the cooperativity of the lattice distortion is reduced, indicating a gradual weakening of the first-order character of the phase transition. Our results demonstrate that such structural modifications, while effective in shifting the transition temperature, inevitably lead to a reduction in the relative sensitivity of phase-transition-based luminescent thermometers.

AI.tldr: 通过Na+部分取代LiYO2:Eu3+中的Li+，可调控相变温度以优化热测量性能，但会降低相对灵敏度
AI.motivation: 基于一级相变的发光温度计具有极高相对灵敏度，但其主要限制在于相变温度相关的狭窄热工作范围。需要开发更经济有效的策略来调控相变温度。
AI.method: 在LiYO2:Eu3+材料的第二配位层中，用Na+部分取代Li+离子，通过引入静态成分无序和局部晶格应变来调控相变温度。
AI.result: Na+取代能显著移动相变温度，实现热测量性能的可控优化。但相变温度降低的同时，竞争结构相之间的焓差减小，晶格畸变的协同性降低，表明一级相变特征逐渐减弱。
AI.conclusion: 这种结构修饰虽然能有效移动相变温度，但不可避免地导致基于相变的发光温度计的相对灵敏度降低。相比之前提出的用其他镧系离子取代Y3+的策略，Na+取代Li+是更经济有效的相变温度调控方法。

title: RHEED pattern classification by a convolutional neural network for the growth of chalcogenide thin films and nanostructures
summary: The use of reflection high energy electron diffraction (RHEED) plays a critical role for in-situ characterization in molecular beam epitaxy, pulsed laser deposition and sputtering. While sensitive to crystal symmetries and morphology, it is used ubiquitously to determine the growth modes of thin films. However, analysis of RHEED patterns depends on skilled experts and is therefore difficult to incorporate into the growth strategy in real-time. The development of machine learning (ML) processes, specifically convolutional neural networks (CNNs), presents a unique opportunity towards real-time RHEED pattern recognition. In this study, we develop a CNN model that can accurately classify four common and distinct RHEED patterns present in chalcogenide thin film growth. Its reached accuracy reached 94.9% for single run and 91.2% when averaged over 20 seeds. Our network is able to distinguish the nucleation of three common growth modes encountered in epitaxy, namely Volmer Weber, Stransky-Krastanov and Frank-van der Merwe, potentially enabling future automation of substrate temperature and shutter control informed by RHEED data. The network is material-agnostic and distinguishes the VW process with greater than 98% accuracy but is somewhat more limited in its ability to properly classify roughening and the initiation of Stransky-Krastanov growth. Our findings show that ML techniques can be successfully implemented even in cases where there is no detailed knowledge of growth chemistry providing an avenue towards real-time incorporation of ML to control nanostructure nucleation and thin film morphology.

AI.tldr: 开发卷积神经网络模型，用于实时识别RHEED衍射图案，准确分类四种常见生长模式，准确率达94.9%
AI.motivation: RHEED在薄膜生长中至关重要，但传统分析依赖专家经验，难以实时集成到生长策略中。机器学习特别是CNN为实现实时RHEED图案识别提供了独特机会
AI.method: 开发卷积神经网络模型，能够准确分类硫族化合物薄膜生长中的四种常见RHEED图案。模型材料无关，能够区分三种常见外延生长模式
AI.result: 模型单次运行准确率达94.9%，20次种子平均准确率为91.2%。能够以超过98%的准确率区分Volmer-Weber生长过程，但在粗糙化和Stransky-Krastanov生长起始分类方面稍有限制
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术即使在缺乏详细生长化学知识的情况下也能成功实施，为实现实时ML控制纳米结构成核和薄膜形态提供了途径

title: Quadrupole formation and coupling to magnetic and structural degrees of freedom in the $5d^1$ double perovskites Ba$_2$MgReO$_6$ and Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$
summary: We investigate the interplay between charge, magnetic, and structural degrees of freedom in the isostructural and isoelectronic $5d^1$ double-perovskites Ba$_2$MgReO$_6$ and Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$. Using first-principles-based electronic structure calculations, we show that both materials exhibit a tendency toward spontaneous quadrupolar order in the cubic paramagnetic phase, which is slightly weaker in Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$ than in Ba$_2$MgReO$_6$. Our analysis further reveals an intimate coupling between the local magnetic moments and charge quadrupoles, mediated by the strong spin-orbit interaction, that leads to the unusual canted configuration of magnetic moments observed in these systems. When structural degrees of freedom are included, the two materials exhibit pronounced differences. In Ba$_2$MgReO$_6$ the strong coupling to Jahn-Teller distortions stabilizes the antiferroic $\mathcal{Q}_{x^2-y^2}$ order, yielding excellent agreement with available experimental data. In contrast, the Jahn-Teller coupling is significantly weaker in Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$ and appears insufficient to stabilize the antiferroic quadrupolar order. While this is consistent with the absence of any measurable long-range structural distortion above the magnetic transition temperature, it contrasts with experimental results indicating a strong canting of the magnetic moments. Our analysis thus successfully describes the mechanisms shaping the properties of the Re-compound while a full quantitative description of the magnetic ground state of Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$ is still elusive.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Ba₂MgReO₆和Ba₂NaOsO₆两种5d¹双钙钛矿材料中电荷、磁性和结构自由度之间的相互作用，揭示了四极矩有序与磁矩倾斜的耦合机制。
AI.motivation: 研究等结构和等电子的5d¹双钙钛矿材料Ba₂MgReO₆和Ba₂NaOsO₆中电荷、磁性和结构自由度之间的复杂相互作用，特别是理解这些系统中观察到的磁矩异常倾斜配置的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理的电子结构计算方法，分析两种材料在立方顺磁相中的自发四极矩有序倾向，研究局域磁矩与电荷四极矩之间的耦合（通过强自旋轨道相互作用介导），并考虑结构自由度（Jahn-Teller畸变）的影响。
AI.result: 两种材料在立方顺磁相中都表现出自发四极矩有序倾向，Ba₂NaOsO₆比Ba₂MgReO₆稍弱。Ba₂MgReO₆中强Jahn-Teller耦合稳定了反铁电Qₓ²-y²有序，与实验数据吻合良好；而Ba₂NaOsO₆的Jahn-Teller耦合显著较弱，不足以稳定反铁电四极矩有序，这与磁转变温度以上无长程结构畸变的实验结果一致，但与观测到的强磁矩倾斜现象存在矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 研究成功解释了Re化合物（Ba₂MgReO₆）的性质形成机制，但对Ba₂NaOsO₆磁性基态的完整定量描述仍然难以实现，表明该系统中可能存在尚未被充分理解的额外物理机制。

title: Phonon assisted light absorption and emission in cubic-Boron Nitride
summary: Cubic boron nitride (cBN) is a wide-bandgap polymorph of boron nitride whose optical response remains only partially understood due to the coexistence of indirect electronic transitions and strong exciton-phonon coupling. Using first-principles many-body perturbation theory, we investigate the optical properties of cBN by combining GW quasiparticle corrections with Bethe-Salpeter equation calculations of excitonic effects. Phonon-assisted absorption and emission processes are explicitly included through the exciton-phonon coupling formalism. We find that phonon-mediated optical transitions provide a dominant contribution to both absorption and luminescence spectra, partially reconciling the discrepancy between the theoretical optical gap ($\simeq$ 11 eV) and experimental emission around 6-7 eV. Our results demonstrate the importance of including exciton-phonon interactions for the correct interpretation of experimental spectra, offering new insights into light emission in wide-bandgap materials.

AI.tldr: 立方氮化硼(cBN)的光学响应研究，通过第一性原理多体微扰理论结合GW-BSE方法，发现声子辅助的光学跃迁对吸收和发光光谱有主要贡献，解释了理论光学带隙(约11 eV)与实验发射(6-7 eV)之间的差异。
AI.motivation: 立方氮化硼(cBN)作为一种宽带隙材料，其光学响应尚未完全理解，主要因为间接电子跃迁与强激子-声子耦合共存。理论与实验之间存在显著差异：理论预测光学带隙约11 eV，而实验观测到的发射在6-7 eV范围内。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理多体微扰理论，结合GW准粒子修正和Bethe-Salpeter方程计算激子效应。通过激子-声子耦合形式明确包含声子辅助的吸收和发射过程。
AI.result: 研究发现声子介导的光学跃迁对吸收和发光光谱都有主要贡献。这在一定程度上调和了理论光学带隙(约11 eV)与实验发射(6-7 eV)之间的差异。声子辅助过程在宽带隙材料的光学响应中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，正确解释实验光谱必须包含激子-声子相互作用。这为理解宽带隙材料中的光发射提供了新见解，强调了多体效应在材料光学性质研究中的重要性。

title: Large Pyroelectric Enhancement in Freestanding Epitaxial BaTiO3 Membranes on Si
summary: Ferroelectric membranes transferred onto arbitrary substrates provide reduced mechanical clamping at the interfaces that can diminish the effective polarization-rotation barrier offering a pathway to engineer larger electromechanical and thermally driven responses in oxide electronics. Here, we report integration of single crystalline thin film BaTiO3 (BTO) ferroelectric membrane on Si and demonstrate a 4x at 30C and 34x at 60C enhancement of pyroelectric coefficient compared to clamped films. The BTO membrane is grown epitaxially on a water-soluble Sr3Al2O6 sacrificial layer, released by selective dissolution, and transferred onto Si, yielding a strain-relaxed membrane with robust intrinsic polarization. Temperature dependent piezoresponse force microscopy (PFM) reveals pronounced thermally driven evolution of domain orientation, consistent with reduced barriers for dipolar modulation in the freestanding state. Variable-temperature Kelvin probe force microscopy (KPFM) quantifies an effective pyroelectric coefficient of ~75 uC/m^2K at 30C and 450 uC/m^2K at 60C with a detectivity of 40 m^2K^-1at room temperature. These results establish lead-free freestanding BTO membranes as a promising silicon-integrable platform for cryogen-free infrared detection and waste-heat energy management.

AI.tldr: 铁电薄膜转移到任意基底上可降低界面机械约束，从而减小有效极化旋转势垒，实现更大的热电系数增强
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过减少铁电薄膜的机械约束来增强其热电性能，为硅基集成红外探测和废热管理提供新平台
AI.method: 在可溶性Sr3Al2O6牺牲层上外延生长BaTiO3薄膜，通过选择性溶解释放并转移到硅基底上，形成应变松弛的独立薄膜
AI.result: 独立薄膜在30°C时热电系数增强4倍，60°C时增强34倍；有效热电系数在30°C达75μC/m²K，60°C达450μC/m²K；室温探测率为40m²K⁻¹
AI.conclusion: 无铅独立BaTiO3薄膜是硅基集成红外探测和废热管理的理想平台，具有显著增强的热电性能

title: Martensitic laminate geometry controls electronic phase transitions in a Mott insulator
summary: Symmetry-lowering structural phase transitions result in multiple degenerate structures whose coexistence is determined by macroscopic strain compatibility. In quantum materials, these structural transformations often couple to electronic degrees of freedom, yet how the structural arrangements influence electronic phase transitions remains poorly understood. By analyzing hundreds of diffraction peaks from X-ray reciprocal space mapping, we determine the lattice basis vectors and mutual orientations of all coexisting phases in epitaxial V2O3 thin films after a symmetry-lowering transformation coincident with a metal-insulator transition. We identify the orientations of interfaces between all coexisting structures using the theory of martensitic phase transformations and find that the low temperature structure comprises finely tuned layered mixtures of alternating twin variants, akin to metal alloys. By comparing films grown on various substrate orientations, we show that the metal-insulator transition temperature increases monotonically with the degree to which these layered mixtures satisfy macroscopic strain compatibility imposed by the substrate.

AI.tldr: 通过X射线倒易空间映射分析V2O3薄膜中的结构相变，发现金属-绝缘体转变温度与基片施加的宏观应变相容性程度呈正相关
AI.motivation: 研究量子材料中结构相变如何影响电子相变，特别是对称性降低的结构相变如何与金属-绝缘体转变耦合
AI.method: 使用X射线倒易空间映射分析数百个衍射峰，确定V2O3薄膜中所有共存相的晶格基矢和相互取向；应用马氏体相变理论识别相界面；比较不同基片取向生长的薄膜
AI.result: 低温结构由交替孪晶变体组成的精细层状混合物构成；金属-绝缘体转变温度随这些层状混合物满足基片施加的宏观应变相容性程度单调增加
AI.conclusion: 结构相变中的应变相容性条件直接影响电子相变温度，为通过控制薄膜生长条件调控量子材料性能提供了新途径

title: Finely Tunable Thermal Expansion of NiTi by Stress-Induced Martensitic Transformation and Thermomechanical Training
summary: Tailoring the thermal expansion of martensitic materials by crystallographic texture and anisotropic variation of lattice parameters is a promising route to a flexible design of thermally stable systems. NiTi alloys are prototype materials in this respect, with shape-memory and superelastic properties owing to their thermoelastic martensitic transformations. Here, we propose a method to realize finely tunable coefficients of thermal expansion (CTE) for the NiTi alloy based upon a special combination of mechanical and thermal training. We achieve a near-zero in-plane CTE that is smaller in value than that of the FeNi-based Invar alloy. Atomistic simulations and theoretical calculations guide the method design and clarify the underlying mechanisms of the relationship between the processing conditions, the microstructural evolution, and the thermal expansion behavior. The directions for further, finer adjustments of the CTE without constraints on the shape of the materials are indicated.

AI.tldr: 通过机械和热处理训练组合方法，实现NiTi合金热膨胀系数的精细调控，获得比因瓦合金更小的近零面内热膨胀系数。
AI.motivation: 通过晶体织构和晶格参数的各向异性变化来调控马氏体材料的热膨胀，是设计热稳定系统的有前景途径。NiTi合金因其热弹性马氏体相变具有形状记忆和超弹性特性，是这方面的原型材料。
AI.method: 提出基于机械和热处理训练特殊组合的方法，实现NiTi合金热膨胀系数的精细调控。通过原子模拟和理论计算指导方法设计，阐明加工条件、微观结构演变与热膨胀行为之间的内在机制关系。
AI.result: 实现了比FeNi基因瓦合金更小的近零面内热膨胀系数，为不受材料形状限制的进一步精细调控热膨胀系数指明了方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过机械和热处理训练组合方法可以精细调控NiTi合金的热膨胀系数，获得优异的近零热膨胀性能，为设计热稳定系统提供了新途径。

title: A stochastic simulation of the dislocation-mediated etching of porous GaN distributed Bragg reflectors
summary: Distributed Bragg reflectors (DBRs) can be fabricated by electrochemically etching nitride epitaxial structures consisting of alternating layers of highly n-type doped and non-intentionally doped (NID) GaN. Threading dislocations (TDs) can be electrochemically etched into transport pipelines that can carry the etchant through the NID layers to access the doped material. Experimentally this has been shown to involve a mechanism where the etching pathway may follow one TD into a doped layer and then propagate sideways through the doped layer to continue via a different TD. Across multiple layers this process creates complex pore structures that have been described as 'cascades'. Here, we build a stochastic simulation for the DBR etching process that can reproduce some key features of the observed microstructures including the cascade morphology. By comparing the simulation output to samples etched at a range of voltages, we show that we can reproduce variations in experimental chronoamperometry data with applied bias by varying the probability of etching the doped layers within the simulation. The outputs of the resulting simulations replicate the experimentally observed cascade morphology. At higher voltages, experimental data reveal a lower proportion of cascade features, a trend that is also replicated by the simulations for relevant probability values. Outputs of the simulations also correlate well with experimental chronoamperometry data for samples where - unlike in a DBR - the thicknesses of the doped layers vary through the epitaxial multilayer, suggesting that the probabilistic simulation can be applied to a range of structures to help understand the dislocation-mediated electrochemical etching process.

AI.tldr: 通过电化学刻蚀氮化物外延结构制备分布式布拉格反射器，利用位错作为传输通道，开发了能模拟实验观察到的级联形态的随机模拟方法
AI.motivation: 理解电化学刻蚀过程中位错介导的复杂孔结构形成机制，特别是观察到的"级联"形态，并开发能够预测不同结构刻蚀行为的模拟工具
AI.method: 建立随机模拟方法模拟DBR刻蚀过程，通过调整掺杂层刻蚀概率来匹配不同电压下的实验数据，并与实验观察的微结构和计时电流数据进行比较
AI.result: 模拟成功复现了实验观察到的级联形态，能够再现不同电压下计时电流数据的变化趋势，并且在掺杂层厚度变化的多层结构中也能与实验数据良好相关
AI.conclusion: 开发的概率模拟方法能够有效理解位错介导的电化学刻蚀过程，可应用于多种结构来预测和优化刻蚀行为，为DBR制备提供理论指导

title: Phase-field simulations of nucleation, growth, and coarsening of $β_1$ precipitates in Mg-Nd alloys
summary: The spatial distribution and morphology of precipitates formed during aging are key factors that determine the precipitation hardening response of various magnesium-rare earth alloys. In recent years, the use of high-performance computing clusters and massively parallel frameworks has enabled quantitative simulations of the evolution of individual and multiple precipitates at relevant length and time scales. However, predictive modeling of precipitate evolution remains challenging, in part because many key thermodynamic and kinetic parameters governing the underlying physics are either unknown or have a high degree of uncertainty. In this work, we developed a workflow in which experimental data were used to parameterize a phase-field model to perform two-dimensional (2D) simulations of concurrent nucleation and evolution of $β_1$ precipitates in magnesium-neodymium alloy during aging. Matrix composition and precipitate number density at different aging times were obtained from atom probe tomography and transmission electron microscopy measurements, respectively. We applied a stereological method to estimate the three-dimensional (3D) number densities from experimental cross-sectional transmission electron micrographs. The estimated 3D number density data were then converted to effective 2D number densities. The effective 2D number density and composition data were used to determine the required model parameters by minimizing the discrepancy between simulation and experimental results. The parameterized model allows for quantitative phase-field simulations of nucleation and growth of $β_1$ precipitates, which can be employed to optimize aging time to achieve a target number density of precipitates. This work highlights an approach to overcome the challenges associated with parameterizing a coupled phase-field and nucleation model.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种结合实验数据参数化相场模型的工作流程，用于模拟镁钕合金中β₁沉淀物的形核与演化，以优化时效处理工艺。
AI.motivation: 镁稀土合金中沉淀物的空间分布和形态是决定其沉淀硬化响应的关键因素。虽然高性能计算使得定量模拟沉淀演化成为可能，但由于许多关键热力学和动力学参数未知或具有高度不确定性，预测性建模仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 开发了一个工作流程：1) 通过原子探针层析和透射电子显微镜获取不同时效时间的基体成分和沉淀物数密度；2) 应用体视学方法从实验截面TEM图像估计三维数密度；3) 将三维数密度转换为有效二维数密度；4) 使用有效二维数密度和成分数据，通过最小化模拟与实验结果差异来确定相场模型参数。
AI.result: 参数化的相场模型能够定量模拟β₁沉淀物的形核和生长，可用于优化时效时间以达到目标沉淀物数密度。该工作为克服相场-形核耦合模型参数化挑战提供了一种有效方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种结合实验数据参数化相场模型的方法，成功实现了镁钕合金中沉淀物演化的定量模拟，为优化时效处理工艺提供了有效工具，并为解决相场-形核耦合模型参数化难题提供了可行途径。
